title: Runway Closure and Flight Reassignment Management
description: The system shall automatically close a runway when requested by the airport operations manager and reassign flights to other available runways.
rationale: To ensure safe and efficient operation of the airport during runway closures, allowing for timely reassignment of flights and accurate delay information recording.
business_value: Improves operational safety and efficiency by providing a systematic approach to runway closure management and flight reassignment, reducing delays and ensuring passenger satisfaction.

source.description: As a airport operations manager I need to close a runway and reassign flights, and mark flights as delayed if the delay exceeds 60 minutes So that flights are safely and efficiently rerouted and accurate delay information is recorded

acceptance_criteria: When flights are reassigned to other runways
Then the system calculates the new delay for each flight
And if the delay exceeds 60 minutes, the flight is marked as delayed
preconditions: Runway closure request is received by the airport operations manager.
There are available alternate runways and slots.
postconditions: Flights have been reassigned to other available runways.
The new delays for each flight have been calculated.
Flights with a delay exceeding 60 minutes have been explicitly marked as delayed in the system.
functional_constraints: The system must accurately calculate delays based on original scheduled departure or arrival time.
Reassignment of flights must consider available alternate runways and slots.

performance: Response time within a reasonable threshold during runway closure events.
availability: Uptime of at least 99.9% to ensure continuous operation.
scalability: The system must be able to handle increased load during peak travel times and runway closures without performance degradation.
usability: Error handling should provide clear, concise messages to the airport operations manager.
User interface should be intuitive and easy to navigate.

edge_cases: No available alternate runways during a closure.
All flights are already delayed and exceed 60 minutes.

interfaces.name: Runway Closure API
interfaces.description: Interface for airport operations manager to request runway closure.

interfaces.name: Flight Schedule Database
interfaces.description: Stores flight schedules, delays, and reassignments.

interfaces.name: Airport Operations Manager Console
interfaces.description: User interface for airport operations manager to manage runway closures.

test_cases.description: Verify runway closure request is processed successfully.
test_cases.expected_result: Runway is closed and flights are reassigned to alternate runways.

test_cases.description: Test delay calculation for a flight with 61 minutes delay.
test_cases.expected_result: Flight is marked as delayed in the system.

test_cases.description: Validate reassignment of flights when no alternate runways are available.
test_cases.expected_result: System handles error gracefully and informs airport operations manager.
